title: Implement manager queue action completion endpoint
description: Add manager queue action completion endpoint and service mutation path to resolve queue items with deterministic state, role/auth guardrails, and response envelope metadata.
acceptance_criteria: POST action endpoint resolves queue item by id and returns deterministic contract metadata
Forbidden and unauthorized envelopes remain auth-session-v1 and deterministic for manager-only access
Queue read endpoint reflects updated completion state after successful action
